name: junkhaul
description: Junk Haul Calgary — same-day junk removal booking platform

scripts.test:unit: node tests/auth.test.js && node tests/foundation.test.js && node tests/donation-intelligence.test.js && node tests/route-versioning.test.js && node tests/unitConversions.test.js && node tests/costConfig.test.js && node tests/costLedger.test.js && node tests/quoteDecision.test.js && node tests/routeEngine.test.js && node tests/disposal.test.js && node tests/itemEvidence.test.js && node tests/aiQuality.test.js && node tests/physicalMeasurements.test.js && node tests/dispatch.test.js && node tests/crewSync.test.js && node tests/reconciliation.test.js && node tests/rehaul.test.js && node tests/donations.test.js && node tests/rehaulCommerce.test.js && node tests/phase5.test.js && node tests/vapiCallerAuth.test.js && node tests/rehaulOrderPolicy.test.js && node tests/paymentStatus.test.js
scripts.test:migrations: node supabase/migrations/payroll.test.js && node supabase/migrations/payment-validation.test.js && npm run migrations:check
scripts.test:security: npm run secret-scan && npm run audit
